result.stdout:
DenebLab StashLock CLI 1.0.0

Usage: [command] [-h|--help] [--version]

Commands:
  cstring     Generate a StashLock connection string from a vault directory.
    
     Examples:
       stashlock cstring ./my-vault
       stashlock cstring ./my-vault --tag production
       stashlock cstring ./my-vault --tag production --base64
       stashlock cstring ./my-vault --tag production --env
  decode      Decrypt an encrypted stashlock file and output the plaintext secrets.
    
     Examples:
       stashlock decode ./my-vault/stashlock.enc.production.secrets.json
       stashlock decode ./my-vault/stashlock.enc.production.secrets.json -key ./keys/stashlock.key.production.json
       stashlock decode ./my-vault/stashlock.enc.production.secrets.json -output ./decrypted.json
  encode      Encrypt a plaintext JSON secrets file using keys from the vault directory.
    
     Examples:
       stashlock encode ./my-vault/secrets.json
       stashlock encode ./my-vault/secrets.json --verbose
  init        Initialize a directory as a StashLock vault.
    
     Examples:
       stashlock init ./my-vault
       stashlock init ./my-vault --tags production,develop
       stashlock init ./my-vault --tags production --url https://vault.example.com --api-key mykey123
  keygen      Generate encryption key files for each tag defined in stashlock.config.json.
    
     Examples:
       stashlock keygen ./my-vault
       stashlock keygen .
  publish     Publish encrypted secrets to the StashLock server.
    
     Examples:
       stashlock publish ./my-vault
       stashlock publish ./my-vault/stashlock.enc.production.secrets.json
       stashlock publish ./my-vault --url https://vault.example.com --api-key mykey123
       stashlock publish ./my-vault --verbose --expires-in 3600

result.stdout:
Usage: cstring  [arguments...] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Generate a StashLock connection string from a vault directory.
    
     Examples:
       stashlock cstring ./my-vault
       stashlock cstring ./my-vault --tag production
       stashlock cstring ./my-vault --tag production --base64
       stashlock cstring ./my-vault --tag production --env

Arguments:
  [0] <string>

Options:
  --tag <string>     [Default: @""]
  --base64          
  --env
